description: Default capability for the main window: core defaults, dialog defaults (folder picker for the ingest agent), shell access scoped to the sift-agent-cli sidecar the app supervises (no unscoped execute), and `shell:open` for escaping external links (System drawer's API docs / Downloads section) out of the webview into the OS's default handler — scoped by tauri.conf.json's `plugins.shell.open` regex to https:// and the local loopback engine only, never an arbitrary file:// or custom scheme.
